name: Appointy

when_to_use: REST API integration for booking into CRM workflow

review.verdict: A competent but unexciting scheduling platform—Acuity or Calendly usually win on polish.
review.best_for: SMBs in service verticals wanting a cheap all-in-one scheduling tool
review.not_for: Dev teams wanting the cleanest API or best user experience
